title: Evidence Entry Schema
description: Schema for a single line in the Evidence Observatory JSONL logs. Every gate evaluation, halt event, override, V&T update, and amendment action produces one entry.

entry_id.description: Unique ID for this evidence entry. Format: {contract_id}-{unix_ms}-{random4}.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was recorded. Immutable once written.

event_type.description: Enumerated event type. All event types must be in this list.

contract_id.description: The contract under which this event occurred.

component.description: Which runtime component produced this entry.

decision.description: The outcome of the gate evaluation. LOG_ONLY for informational events.

user.description: User or service identity that triggered the event.

role.description: Role of the actor at time of event.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Structure depends on event_type. Free-form but should be minimal and non-sensitive.

halt_conditions_triggered.description: List of halt condition IDs that were activated by this event.

halt_conditions_cleared.description: List of halt condition IDs that were resolved by this event.

override_id.description: If this event was processed under a break-glass override, its ID.

vnt_ref.description: Reference to a V&T statement associated with this event.

evidence_paths.description: File paths or URLs to supporting evidence for this entry.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the event. Shown in Contract Window and Council dashboard.

integrity_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the JSON entry (excluding this field). Used for tamper detection.
